recommendations.title: After We Fell
recommendations.overview: Just as Tessa's life begins to become unglued, nothing is what she thought it would be. Not her friends nor her family. The only person that she should be able to rely on is Hardin, who is furious when he discovers the massive secret that she's been

recommendations.title: Half Sister, Full Love
recommendations.overview: Mourning his brother's recent death, Pierrick accepts his best friend Tessa's invitation to stay in her family home — at last, a week alone. But when her gets there, he finds the house already occupied by Tessa's sister Marie.

recommendations.title: After Everything
recommendations.overview: Besieged by writer’s block and the crushing breakup with Tessa, Hardin travels to Portugal in search of a woman he wronged in the past – and to find himself. Hoping to win back Tessa, he realizes he needs to change his ways before he can make the ult

recommendations.title: After We Collided
recommendations.overview: Tessa finds herself struggling with her complicated relationship with Hardin; she faces a dilemma that could change their lives forever.

recommendations.title: Along for the Ride
recommendations.overview: The summer before college, Auden meets the mysterious Eli, a fellow insomniac. While the seaside town of Colby sleeps, the two embark on nightly quests to help Auden experience the fun, carefree teen life she never knew she wanted.

recommendations.title: I'm Not Ashamed
recommendations.overview: Based on the journal entries of Rachel Joy Scott, the first student killed in the Columbine High School shooting in 1999.

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: Summerland
recommendations.overview: A woman during the Second World War opens her heart to an evacuee after initially resolving to be rid of him.

recommendations.title: A Little Bit of Heaven
recommendations.overview: A guarded woman finds out she's dying of cancer but, when she meets her match, the threat of falling in love is scarier than death.

recommendations.title: Unforgettable
recommendations.overview: Barely coping with the end of her marriage, Tessa Connover learns that her ex-husband, David, is now happily engaged to Julia. Trying to settle into her new life after moving in with David, Julia believes she has finally met the man of her dreams, th
